title: Satya Nadella Tells Microsoft Employees Not Every Problem Needs AI
description: Microsoft's CEO, Satya Nadella, emphasizes the need for employees to use artificial intelligence judiciously. He acknowledges the rapid integration of AI tools into everyday tasks but warns against applying advanced models to every problem., Technology & Science, Times Now
content: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella is urging employees to be smart while using artificial intelligence in their professional lives. He said that Microsoft believes not every problem is supposed to be solved with advanced AI models, as AI tools become increa... [1487 chars]

title: life RoboCops will patrol British streets
description: EXCLUSIVE: The top cop in charge of rolling out Artificial Intelligence (AI) to the police services in England and Wales spoke to the Daily Star about the future of policing in Britain
content: RoboCops are "unlikely" to ever patrol British streets, the police chief in charge of Artificial Intelligence (AI) has said. In an exclusive interview with the Daily Star, Chief Constable Alex Murray explained why the the sci-fi action movie will "pr... [2275 chars]

title: Globalisation is dead, Sridhar Vembu says after US restricts Mythos and Fable access to Americans only
description: A US order forcing Anthropic to restrict access to its latest AI models has sparked fresh questions about who controls the future of artificial intelligence. Sridhar Vembu calls it a wake-up call for India, saying "globalisation is dead" and the country must build its own AI capabilities.
content: Anthropic is disabling access to its most powerful AI models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, for all foreign nationals, both inside and outside the US, to comply with a government order. This means Indian users will no longer be able to access the models, reg... [3876 chars]

title: AI-based app to provide free learning support to rural students in UP's Amethi
description: Amethi, Jun 13 (PTI) Students in Amethi will get access to free digital learning support through an artificial intelligence-based education application, aimed at making quality educational resources more accessible, especially for students in rural areas. The initiative was launched in the district on Friday evening by representatives of the ZapTick AI app and district-based NGO […]

title: KPMG the latest firm to be caught out using AI
description: Top consultancy apparently used artificial intelligence to source parts of a report extolling virtues of AI
content:

title: OpenAI Mulls “Drastic” Price Cuts Amid AI Market Turmoil
description: OpenAI is considering significantly reducing the prices it charges for its artificial intelligence (AI) services, according to a Wall Street Journal (WSJ) report cited by ZeroHedge [1]. The move is an attempt to regain customers from rival Anthropic, whose coding tool Claude Code has driven a surge in revenue. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said at a […]

title: US bars foreigners from using Anthropic’s AI models
description: Anthropic said the US government had ordered the company to suspend access for all foreign nationals to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 artificial intelligence models.
content:
The limits on foreigners represent a new chapter in Anthropic’s often prickly relationship with the federal government and are a highly unusual example of federal authorities dictating how a technology company can operate.
